_comment: Optional. Copy to secaudit.config.json in your working dir. No secrets here — credentials are env vars (BYOK), and scanners are tools you install (BYOT).
_comment_models: The 'models' map adds or overrides AI model aliases. Each value is { provider, modelId } OR a 'provider:modelId' string OR a bare string (treated as a Bedrock model id).
_comment_scanners: Optional scanner tuning. 'default' is the list used when --mode includes scanners and you don't pass -s. You normally don't need this section; install the tools and they're auto-detected.
